name: Rickie Lee Jones
abstract: Rickie Lee Jones (born November 8, 1954) is an American singer, musician, and songwriter. Over the course of a career that spans five decades and 15 studio albums, she has recorded in various musical styles including rock, R&B, pop, soul, and jazz.

about_quotes.speaker: Red Callender
about_quotes.evidence: I was on a date with Rickie Lee Jones. They called me to put a bass line and a tuba line for some things she had done.

about_quotes.speaker: Carl Allen
about_quotes.evidence: And so whether it’s Ruth Brown or Rickie Lee Jones or Sarah Vaughan or whomever it is that I’ve played with, I’m just appreciative.
about_quotes.doc_title: Carl Allen interviewed by Monk Rowe, Atlanta, Georgia, January 4, 2013

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: another one is the new girl Sheryl Crow, good singer, of the Rickie Lee Jones kind, sort of.
